title: myriocephalus occidentalis
intro: Myriocephalus occidentalis, also known as the Western Myriocephalus or Western Cudweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Myriocephalus occidentalis include reducing inflammation and promoting the healing process of minor cuts and scrapes. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used topically as a cream or salve to soothe and calm irritated skin.
